docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KUMIN, VALERIA AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON ACCOUNTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEPONENT THOMPSON ACCOUNTING
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUMIN, VALERIA AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON ACCOUNTING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT VALERIA KUMIN. DEFENDANT THOMPSON ACCOUNTING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MEGAN THOMPSON, PARTNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUMIN, VALERIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON ACCOUNTING $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,045.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2000.00 PLUS COSTS. SEE MC-025 FORM FOR DETAILS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-31-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON ACCOUNTING
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
